langs.en: Air quality is acceptable. Sensitive groups should watch for symptoms.
langs.hi: Vayu gunavatta theek hai. Sanvedansheel logon ko lakshanon par dhyan dena chahiye.
langs.regional: Havechi gunvatta theek aahe. Samvedansheel vyaktinni lakshanankade laksh dyave.
